steps.title: Identify what 'how long' requires
steps.content: The student wants to specify HOW LONG the pound was used. This requires stating both when it began and when it ended—a complete time period.

steps.title: Choose the answer with the full duration
steps.content: A directly states the pound's time period: 1965 to 1971. B omits the end date, C focuses on the dalasi's adoption rather than the pound's duration, and D includes no dates. That matches choice A — A is correct.
